title: RFE: allow to configure default DNS
body:
/kind feature


**Description**

It would be nice to have a way to configure the default guest DNS settings without passing them everytime with `podman run`.   E.g. with docker, it was possible to give `---dns` to the `dockerd` daemon.

I have to change DNS guest settings because the host has only IPv6 resolvers in its `/etc/resolv.conf` which are not supported yet by podman.

Perhaps some setting in `libpod.conf`... But there should be added a mechanism to include other files (e.g. `/etc/containers/conf.d/*.conf`) instead of overriding the whole `libpod.conf`.
